race.comment: Tough race. COUPLES RETREAT (7) eye-catching return and will find this more to her liking with the good second-up record. Maps well and will get through the going. Each way. BIG PAPA (12) resumes after making rapid improvement in his second prep. Came to the end of the campaign when seventh in the G3 Vo Rogue at Eagle Farm last January. Back with the two searching trials and can go on with it this time in. MADRINA (2) in good order and from an in form stable. Claim helps and handles the conditions. CONFIDENTIALITY (11) comes right into calculations after some key scratchings. Drawn sticky but is going well enough.
